title: Baise-moi
tmdbOverview: Nadine and Manu are two mad women, as tidy as can be, almost perfectionists. They have several things in common: extreme sex, drugs, beer and the trigger. They find the solution to their problems with guns and beware to those who dare to get in their way!
synopsis: Baise-moi is a 2000 crime, drama and thriller film from France. It has a 4.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R 18+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
